articles.title: Chainlink Approaches Significant Supply Wall
articles.description: Chainlink has seen a significant increase in bullish momentum, currently leading the cryptocurrency market. Still, multiple indicators suggest that LINK could experience a brief correction if it enters the $10 zone. Chainlink has outperformed the top 10 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization, surging more than 6% since the start of Fridays trading session.LINK rallied from a low of $8.97 to...

articles.title: Kraken’s Proof of Reserves Audit Now Supports $XRP and $ADA
articles.description: On Thursday (August 11), crypto exchange Kraken released the results of its “second 2022 Proof of Reserves audit”, which has been expanded to include seven digital assets. These seven cryptoassets are $BTC, $ETH, $USDT, $USDC, $XRP, $ADA, and $DOT. According to Kraken’s blog post, “a Proof of Reserve audit is a trail-blazing accounting procedure that […]

articles.title: Huobi Founder in Talks to Sell Majority Stake at $3B Valuation: Report
articles.description: The deal could be one of the biggest in the crypto industry, netting Li over $1 billion at an equity valuation of around $3 billion. Huobi founder Leon Li is reportedly in talks with investors to sell roughly 60% of the exchange.According toa Friday Bloomberg report, the founder of one of the worlds largest cryptocurrency exchanges, Huobi Global, has held talks with multiple investors,...

articles.title: Huobi Founder Keen On Selling Majority Of His Stake At $3 Billion Value: Report
articles.description: Leon Li might sell his stake in Huobi at a valuation of between $2 billion and $3 billion, while some possible buyers are said to be Justin Sun and Sam Bankman-Fried.
